title.en: Spanning Tree State Machines: Timers and Per-Bridge Variables
title.zh: 生成树状态机：定时器与每桥变量

blocks.en: The spanning tree protocols in IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 are written as a set of cooperating state machines. Those machines need two kinds of memory: countdown timers that fire after a number of seconds, and stored constants and computed values that describe the bridge as a whole. This lesson is the reference walkthrough of both. Clause 13.25 lists the per-port countdown timers; Clause 13.26 lists the variables held once per bridge (one set for the CIST and one for each MSTI). A bridge is a device that forwards frames between LAN segments; CIST stands for Common and Internal Spanning Tree (the single tree spanning the whole network), and an MSTI is a Multiple Spanning Tree Instance (one of several independent trees, each carrying a different group of VLANs).
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 中的生成树协议被写成一组相互协作的状态机。这些状态机需要两类记忆：会在若干秒后触发的倒计时定时器，以及描述整座桥的存储常量与计算值。本课就是对这两者的参考级讲解。13.25 条列出每端口的倒计时定时器；13.26 条列出每桥保存一份的变量（CIST 一套，每个 MSTI 各一套）。桥（Bridge）是在多个 LAN 网段之间转发帧的设备；CIST 指公共与内部生成树（Common and Internal Spanning Tree，覆盖整个网络的单一树），MSTI 指多生成树实例（Multiple Spanning Tree Instance，多棵相互独立的树之一，每棵承载不同的一组 VLAN）。

blocks.en: A helpful naming convention: a timer ending in 'While' (fdWhile, rrWhile, tcWhile) counts down while some condition holds, and the protocol does something different once it hits zero. A timer ending in 'When' (helloWhen, pseudoInfoHelloWhen) schedules a recurring event. So 'fdWhile' = 'how long we stay in forward delay,' and 'helloWhen' = 'when to send the next Hello.'
blocks.zh: 一个有用的命名规律：以 'While' 结尾的定时器（fdWhile、rrWhile、tcWhile）在某条件成立期间倒计时，归零后协议会做出不同动作。以 'When' 结尾的定时器（helloWhen、pseudoInfoHelloWhen）则安排一个周期性事件。所以 'fdWhile' 可理解为“我们还要在转发延迟态停留多久”，'helloWhen' 则是“何时发送下一个 Hello”。

blocks.en: Per Clause 13.25, each timer holds an integral number of seconds remaining before it expires. Three timers exist per port: edgeDelayWhile (13.25.1), the Edge Delay timer, counts down in the absence of a received BPDU before the port is declared an operEdge Port (an edge port faces an end station, not another bridge; BPDU = Bridge Protocol Data Unit, the spanning tree control message). helloWhen (13.25.3), the Hello timer, ensures a Designated Port transmits at least one BPDU every HelloTime period. mdelayWhile (13.25.4), the Migration Delay timer, gives another RST bridge on the same LAN time to synchronize migration state before a received BPDU may change which BPDU types this port sends; it is initialized to MigrateTime (13.26.6). RST = Rapid Spanning Tree.
blocks.zh: 根据 13.25 条，每个定时器保存距其到期还剩的整数秒数。每端口有三个定时器：edgeDelayWhile（13.25.1）即边缘延迟定时器，在未收到 BPDU 期间倒计时，归零后该端口被判定为 operEdge 端口（边缘端口面向终端站而非另一座桥；BPDU 即桥协议数据单元 Bridge Protocol Data Unit，是生成树控制报文）。helloWhen（13.25.3）即 Hello 定时器，确保指定端口在每个 HelloTime 周期内至少发送一个 BPDU。mdelayWhile（13.25.4）即迁移延迟定时器，给同一 LAN 上的另一座 RST 桥留出时间同步其迁移状态，之后收到的 BPDU 才可改变本端口发送的 BPDU 类型；它被初始化为 MigrateTime（13.26.6）。RST 即快速生成树 Rapid Spanning Tree。

blocks.en: Six more timers exist once per port for the CIST and once per port for each MSTI. fdWhile (13.25.2), the Forward Delay timer, delays port-state transitions until other bridges have received the spanning tree information. rrWhile (13.25.7) is the Recent Root timer. rbWhile (13.25.5), the Recent Backup timer, stays at its initial value — twice HelloTime — while the port is a Backup Port. tcWhile (13.25.9), the Topology Change timer, causes TCN (Topology Change Notification) messages to be sent while it runs. rcvdInfoWhile (13.25.6), the Received Info timer, is the time left before received portPriority and portTimes information is aged out if no further message arrives. tcDetected (13.25.8) is a Topology Change timer used for MRP (Multiple Registration Protocol) usage: 'New' messages are sent while it runs.
blocks.zh: 还有六个定时器，CIST 每端口一份、每个 MSTI 每端口各一份。fdWhile（13.25.2）即转发延迟定时器，推迟端口状态转换，直到其他桥已收到生成树信息。rrWhile（13.25.7）是最近根定时器（Recent Root timer）。rbWhile（13.25.5）即最近备份定时器，当端口为备份端口时保持其初始值——两倍 HelloTime。tcWhile（13.25.9）即拓扑变化定时器，运行期间会发送 TCN（拓扑变化通知 Topology Change Notification）报文。rcvdInfoWhile（13.25.6）即收到信息定时器，是若无后续报文到来则收到的 portPriority 与 portTimes 信息被老化前所剩的时间。tcDetected（13.25.8）是供 MRP（多注册协议 Multiple Registration Protocol）使用的拓扑变化定时器：其运行期间发送 'New' 报文。

blocks.en: One timer is special. pseudoInfoHelloWhen (13.25.10), the Pseudo Info Hello When timer, exists per port only when L2GP (Layer 2 Gateway Port) functionality is provided. It prompts the L2GP Port Receive state machine to simulate the reception of a BPDU at HelloTime intervals — that is, the port behaves as if a peer keeps sending it Hellos, even though no real neighbor does. This lets a gateway port hold a stable role without a live spanning tree partner.
blocks.zh: 有一个定时器较为特殊。pseudoInfoHelloWhen（13.25.10）即伪信息 Hello When 定时器，仅当提供 L2GP（二层网关端口 Layer 2 Gateway Port）功能时才每端口存在一份。它促使 L2GP 端口接收状态机以 HelloTime 为间隔模拟收到一个 BPDU——也就是说，即便没有真实邻居，该端口也表现得仿佛某个对端在持续向它发送 Hello。这使网关端口在没有活跃生成树伙伴的情况下也能保持一个稳定的角色。

blocks.en: Table 13-5 in the standard pins down the defaults these timers and parameters use: Migrate Time 3.0 s (fixed), Hello Time 2.0 s (fixed), Bridge Max Age 20.0 s (range 6.0–40.0), Bridge Forward Delay 15.0 s (range 4.0–30.0), Transmit Hold Count 6 (range 1–10), and Max Hops 20 (range 6–40). All times are in seconds. The standard also enforces 2 × (Forward Delay − 1.0) ≥ Max Age ≥ 2 × (Hello Time + 1.0) so the protocols stay correct.
blocks.zh: 标准中的表 13-5 固定了这些定时器与参数的默认值：迁移时间 3.0 秒（固定）、Hello 时间 2.0 秒（固定）、桥最大老化时间 20.0 秒（范围 6.0–40.0）、桥转发延迟 15.0 秒（范围 4.0–30.0）、发送保持计数 6（范围 1–10）、最大跳数 20（范围 6–40）。所有时间单位为秒。标准还强制满足 2 ×（转发延迟 − 1.0）≥ 最大老化时间 ≥ 2 ×（Hello 时间 + 1.0），以保证协议正确运行。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Per-port timers] --> B[edgeDelayWhile: declare edge port]
  A --> C[helloWhen: send next BPDU]
  A --> D[mdelayWhile: migration sync]
  E[Per-port, per-tree timers] --> F[fdWhile: forward delay]
  E --> G[rrWhile / rbWhile: recent root/backup]
  E --> H[tcWhile / tcDetected: topology change]
  E --> I[rcvdInfoWhile: age out info]
  J[L2GP only] --> K[pseudoInfoHelloWhen: simulate Hello]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[每端口定时器] --> B[edgeDelayWhile: 判定边缘端口]
  A --> C[helloWhen: 发送下一个 BPDU]
  A --> D[mdelayWhile: 迁移同步]
  E[每端口每树定时器] --> F[fdWhile: 转发延迟]
  E --> G[rrWhile / rbWhile: 最近根/备份]
  E --> H[tcWhile / tcDetected: 拓扑变化]
  E --> I[rcvdInfoWhile: 老化信息]
  J[仅 L2GP] --> K[pseudoInfoHelloWhen: 模拟 Hello]

blocks.en: Clause 13.26 moves from timers to per-bridge variables. Three are held once per bridge component and treated as constants by the state machines: ForceProtocolVersion (13.26.5), the Force Protocol Version parameter that selects which protocol generation the bridge runs; MigrateTime (13.26.6), the Migrate Time value from Table 13-5 (must not be changed); and TxHoldCount (13.26.12), the Transmit Hold Count that rate-limits BPDU transmission — if it is modified, every port's txCount is reset to zero. If MSTP (Multiple Spanning Tree Protocol) or ISIS-SPB (Shortest Path Bridging) is implemented, the bridge also holds MstConfigId (13.26.7), its current MCID (MST Configuration Identifier); changing it asserts BEGIN, restarting all state machines. A change to ForceProtocolVersion or MstConfigId likewise asserts BEGIN everywhere.
blocks.zh: 13.26 条从定时器转向每桥变量。其中三个每桥组件保存一份，并被状态机视为常量：ForceProtocolVersion（13.26.5）即强制协议版本参数，选择桥运行的协议代际；MigrateTime（13.26.6）即来自表 13-5 的迁移时间值（不得更改）；TxHoldCount（13.26.12）即对 BPDU 发送进行限速的发送保持计数——若其被修改，则所有端口的 txCount 复位为零。若实现了 MSTP（多生成树协议 Multiple Spanning Tree Protocol）或 ISIS-SPB（最短路径桥接 Shortest Path Bridging），桥还保存 MstConfigId（13.26.7）即其当前 MCID（MST 配置标识符）；更改它会触发 BEGIN，从而重启所有状态机。更改 ForceProtocolVersion 或 MstConfigId 同样会在各处触发 BEGIN。

blocks.en: Six per-bridge variables exist once for the CIST and once for each MSTI. BridgeIdentifier (13.26.2) is the unique Bridge Identifier for that tree; its 12-bit system-ID extension is set to zero for the CIST and to the MSTID for an MSTI, so the CIST and each MSTI get distinct identifiers from one bridge address. BridgePriority (13.26.3) is the bridge's own priority vector — its root, regional-root, and designated-bridge components all equal the BridgeIdentifier, with cost and designated-port components zero; updtRolesTree() uses it to compute rootPriority. BridgeTimes (13.26.4) carries the bridge's own Forward Delay, Max Age, a Message Age of zero, and Max Hops for the CIST (Max Hops only for an MSTI); it feeds rootTimes. BridgeIdentifier, BridgePriority, and BridgeTimes are constants to the state machines — management changes force a full recompute of priority vectors and port roles.
blocks.zh: 有六个每桥变量，CIST 一份、每个 MSTI 各一份。BridgeIdentifier（13.26.2）是该树的唯一桥标识符；其 12 位系统 ID 扩展在 CIST 中置零、在 MSTI 中置为 MSTID，因此 CIST 与每个 MSTI 可从同一个桥地址得到互不相同的标识符。BridgePriority（13.26.3）是桥自身的优先级向量——其根、区域根、指定桥分量都等于 BridgeIdentifier，而开销与指定端口分量为零；updtRolesTree() 用它计算 rootPriority。BridgeTimes（13.26.4）携带桥自身的转发延迟、最大老化时间、值为零的报文年龄，以及 CIST 的最大跳数（MSTI 只含最大跳数）；它供给 rootTimes。BridgeIdentifier、BridgePriority、BridgeTimes 对状态机而言是常量——管理更改会强制全面重算优先级向量与端口角色。

blocks.en: The other three per-tree variables are computed results rather than constants. rootPortId (13.26.9) is the Port Identifier of the Root Port and a component of the root priority vector. rootPriority (13.26.10) holds the Root Identifier, path-cost, regional-root, designated-bridge, and designated-port components of the bridge's root priority vector (the full set for the CIST, the regional subset for an MSTI). rootTimes (13.26.11) holds the bridge's timer parameters — Message Age, Max Age, Forward Delay, and remainingHops — derived from the Root Port's portTimes or from BridgeTimes. Together these three answer: which port leads to the root, how good is that path, and which timing values the bridge inherits from upstream.
blocks.zh: 另外三个每树变量是计算结果而非常量。rootPortId（13.26.9）是根端口的端口标识符，也是根优先级向量的一个分量。rootPriority（13.26.10）保存桥的根优先级向量中的根标识符、路径开销、区域根、指定桥与指定端口分量（CIST 为完整一组，MSTI 为区域子集）。rootTimes（13.26.11）保存桥的定时参数——报文年龄、最大老化时间、转发延迟与剩余跳数（remainingHops）——它们由根端口的 portTimes 或 BridgeTimes 派生而来。这三者合起来回答：哪个端口通向根、该路径有多好、以及桥从上游继承了哪些定时值。

blocks.en: Finally, two per-bridge variables appear only when ISIS-SPB is implemented, with a single instance supporting all SPTs (Shortest Path Trees). agreementDigest (13.26.1) is the Agreement Digest calculated by ISIS-SPB and updated alongside other computed parameters. AuxMstConfigId (13.26.8) holds the previous value of the bridge's MCID, saved to nonvolatile memory when certain non-critical configuration changes are made on a bridge that supports ISIS-SPB non-critical changes.
blocks.zh: 最后，有两个每桥变量仅在实现 ISIS-SPB 时出现，且以单一实例支持所有 SPT（最短路径树 Shortest Path Tree）。agreementDigest（13.26.1）是由 ISIS-SPB 计算的协商摘要，并与其他计算参数一同更新。AuxMstConfigId（13.26.8）保存桥 MCID 的先前值，在支持 ISIS-SPB 非关键更改的桥上做出某些非关键配置更改时被写入非易失性存储。

summary.en: Coverage map — every clause in 13.25 and 13.26
summary.zh: 覆盖图——13.25 与 13.26 的每一条

blocks.en: Clause 13.25 State machine timers (per-port, integral seconds): 13.25.1 edgeDelayWhile (Edge Delay → operEdge Port); 13.25.2 fdWhile (Forward Delay, per tree); 13.25.3 helloWhen (Hello, ≥1 BPDU per HelloTime); 13.25.4 mdelayWhile (Migration Delay, init = MigrateTime); 13.25.5 rbWhile (Recent Backup, 2×HelloTime, per tree); 13.25.6 rcvdInfoWhile (Received Info, ages out portPriority/portTimes, per tree); 13.25.7 rrWhile (Recent Root, per tree); 13.25.8 tcDetected (TC timer for MRP 'New' messages, per tree); 13.25.9 tcWhile (TC timer, sends TCN, per tree); 13.25.10 pseudoInfoHelloWhen (L2GP simulated Hello). Clause 13.26 Per Bridge variables: 13.26.1 agreementDigest (ISIS-SPB digest); 13.26.2 BridgeIdentifier (unique per tree, sysID-ext = 0 for CIST / MSTID for MSTI); 13.26.3 BridgePriority (bridge priority vector → rootPriority); 13.26.4 BridgeTimes (Fwd Delay, Max Age, MsgAge=0, Max Hops → rootTimes); 13.26.5 ForceProtocolVersion (protocol generation); 13.26.6 MigrateTime (fixed, Table 13-5); 13.26.7 MstConfigId (current MCID, change asserts BEGIN); 13.26.8 AuxMstConfigId (previous MCID, NVRAM, ISIS-SPB); 13.26.9 rootPortId (Root Port's Port Identifier); 13.26.10 rootPriority (root priority vector components); 13.26.11 rootTimes (MsgAge, Max Age, Fwd Delay, remainingHops); 13.26.12 TxHoldCount (rate limit; change resets all txCount).
blocks.zh: 13.25 条 状态机定时器（每端口，整数秒）：13.25.1 edgeDelayWhile（边缘延迟→operEdge 端口）；13.25.2 fdWhile（转发延迟，每树）；13.25.3 helloWhen（Hello，每 HelloTime ≥1 个 BPDU）；13.25.4 mdelayWhile（迁移延迟，初值 = MigrateTime）；13.25.5 rbWhile（最近备份，2×HelloTime，每树）；13.25.6 rcvdInfoWhile（收到信息，老化 portPriority/portTimes，每树）；13.25.7 rrWhile（最近根，每树）；13.25.8 tcDetected（供 MRP 'New' 报文的 TC 定时器，每树）；13.25.9 tcWhile（TC 定时器，发送 TCN，每树）；13.25.10 pseudoInfoHelloWhen（L2GP 模拟 Hello）。13.26 条 每桥变量：13.26.1 agreementDigest（ISIS-SPB 摘要）；13.26.2 BridgeIdentifier（每树唯一，sysID 扩展在 CIST 为 0 / MSTI 为 MSTID）；13.26.3 BridgePriority（桥优先级向量→rootPriority）；13.26.4 BridgeTimes（转发延迟、最大老化、报文年龄=0、最大跳数→rootTimes）；13.26.5 ForceProtocolVersion（协议代际）；13.26.6 MigrateTime（固定，表 13-5）；13.26.7 MstConfigId（当前 MCID，更改触发 BEGIN）；13.26.8 AuxMstConfigId（先前 MCID，NVRAM，ISIS-SPB）；13.26.9 rootPortId（根端口的端口标识符）；13.26.10 rootPriority（根优先级向量分量）；13.26.11 rootTimes（报文年龄、最大老化、转发延迟、剩余跳数）；13.26.12 TxHoldCount（限速；更改复位所有 txCount）。

cites.note: Clause 13.25 State machine timers (13.25.1-13.25.10) and Clause 13.26 Per Bridge variables (13.26.1-13.26.12), plus Table 13-5 timer/parameter values.
